welcome.englishOnlyActiveNote: English is available now. More languages are staged next.

choice.configureNewSetupDesc: Start fresh and let us guide you step-by-step through setting up TMDb, OMDb, and your media folder paths.
choice.importBackupProfileDesc: Instantly load your settings from an existing SWAYA backup file.

tmdb.requiredToContinueDesc: We'll need this to unlock real title matching, posters, backdrops, and cast info.
tmdb.onlyOnce: Only needs to be done once
tmdb.onlyOnceDesc: Enter both the TMDb API Key (v3) and Read Access Token (v4) once, and SWAYA will remember them for you.
tmdb.showMe: Show me where to get it

omdb.optionalButRecommendedDesc: A free OMDb API key lets you pull IMDb ratings and Rotten Tomatoes scores automatically.

completion.title: Setup Complete!
completion.description: SWAYA is all set up and ready to organize your media! Click Finish to save and open your dashboard.

tmdbGuide.scanningLimited: Without TMDb, we can only read basic file info like size and format.

omdbGuide.ratingsPurposeDesc: SWAYA uses OMDb to fetch IMDb, Metascore, and Rotten Tomatoes ratings when fetching details.
omdbGuide.ratingsMetricsDesc: These ratings are what you see on the movie and show detail pages.
